metadata.description: Flavor definitions for PrismQ Idea Creation system

default_fields.hook: The attention-grabbing opening or central question
default_fields.core_concept: The main idea or premise in 1-2 sentences
default_fields.emotional_core: The emotional heart of the story
default_fields.audience_connection: Why this resonates with the target audience

Soft Supernatural + Friendship.description: Gentle supernatural with friendship and emotional growth

Light Mystery + Adventure.description: Puzzles and adventure without dark themes

Sci-Fi + School Realism.description: Near-future tech meets real school life

Overheard Truth Seed.description: Accidentally hearing something not meant for them

Growing Apart Seed.description: Recognizing a connection is changing or fading

Body Acceptance Seed.description: Journey toward body acceptance and self-love

Future Anxiety Seed.description: Fears and uncertainty about the future

Teen Girl Drama.description: Relatable dramatic stories for teen girls

Body Acceptance + Real Talk.description: Body image with honest emotional depth

Online Connection + Teen Voice.description: Digital life meets authentic teen expression

Teen Girl Heart.description: Emotional core stories for 13-17 young women

Infinity Loop Close.description: Video closes where it opens – last frame or phrase flows seamlessly into the first, triggering automatic replay
cta_templates: Did you catch how it looped back?
Watch again – notice the connection between first and last second?
Verbal or visual loop – which felt more satisfying? 👇

Hidden Detail Hunt.description: 1–3 intentionally planted easter eggs in the frame that reward a second viewing and spark comments
cta_templates: Find all 3 things that are 'off' – drop what you found 👇
Did you spot the hidden detail? Comment below
What did you catch on your second watch?

Before/After Reveal.description: Transformation story with the payoff held until the very end, maximising completion and saves for reference
cta_templates: Save this for inspo 🔖
Which part surprised you most?
Did you see that coming? 👀
ab_variants: reveal at 70% vs 90% of video length

Micro-Mystery (8–12s).description: Extremely short riddle that only makes full sense after a second viewing, driving rewatch and tip comments
cta_templates: What do you think happened? Drop your theory 👇
Watch it twice – does it change your answer?
Can you figure it out before the end?

Chat Screenshot Story.description: Story told through chat-window screenshots with a twist – reading pace forces a replay to catch all details
cta_templates: Send this to someone who needs to see it
Did you catch the twist? 👀
Tag a friend this reminds you of

\"Wait for it\" Payoff.description: Structure promises a payoff and delivers it right at the end, maximising watch-through via delayed reward
cta_templates: Did the payoff hit? Let me know 👇
Worth the wait? 😅
Drop a ⭐ if you stayed till the end

Checklist Replay.description: Dense checklist intentionally too fast for one viewing, driving saves and replays through information density
cta_templates: Save this – you'll need it later 🔖
How many can you memorise in one watch?
Screenshot the one that resonates most 📸
ab_variants: low text density vs high text density

\"POV: Girl Math\".description: Inside-joke or 'girl logic' framing that sparks comments of agreement, disagreement or personal additions
cta_templates: Ok which one of us is this? 🙋‍♀️
Agree or disagree – explain yourself 👇
Add yours in the comments
ab_variants: soft/cute version vs hot take version

Green/Red Flag Radar.description: Green-flag / red-flag framing invites normative debate and long explanatory comments by asking audiences to rate or justify
cta_templates: Green or red flag? Explain WHY 👇
Rate it 1–10 and tell me your reason
Which one would you add to this list?

Soft Hot Take.description: Polarising statement in a safe, non-toxic tone that motivates audiences to share their opinion without conflict
cta_templates: Hot take – agree or disagree? 🔥
Tell me your honest opinion below 👇
Share this if you agree (or disagree 😅)

Mini-Series Hook.description: Video functions as a named episode in a series, driving watch-more and follows through seriality
cta_templates: Follow for Part 2 coming this week 📲
Drop a 🔔 if you want the next episode
Part 1 of ? – tell me what to cover next
ab_variants: explicit series name vs no series name

\"I Wish I Knew\" Confessional.description: Mentoring-tone confession builds trust and drives saves plus empathy comments through narrative transport
cta_templates: Save this for your future self 🔖
What do YOU wish someone had told you? 👇
Tag a friend who needs this right now
ab_variants: "I wish I knew…" vs "No one told me…"

\"Rate My Outfit/Plan\".description: Audience rates an outfit, date plan or morning routine – low barrier to comment triggers high reply volume
cta_templates: Rate this outfit 1–10 👇
Team A or Team B – which would YOU pick?
Give me your honest rating, I can take it 😅

Aesthetic Satisfying Loop.description: Visually satisfying process (pouring, folding, organising) where the natural loop rewards repeat viewing through sensory pleasure
cta_templates: Satisfying or not? Be honest 👇
Watch this to reset your brain 🧠✨
Save for your next "I need to calm down" moment 🔖

\"2 Endings\" Replay.description: Two possible interpretations of the ending – a second viewing reveals the alternate meaning, driving rewatch and comment debate
cta_templates: Which ending did YOU see? 👇
Watch it again – do you get a different meaning?
Team Ending A or Team Ending B?
ab_variants: Ending A first vs Ending B first

\"Spot the Difference\".description: Outfit, hair or room 'spot the difference' game – visual search drives rewatch and turns comments into a scoreboard
cta_templates: How many differences did you spot? 👇
First to find all 5 wins 🏆
Drop your number – no cheating 😂

\"One Line Twist\".description: A single sentence reframes the entire video's meaning, driving shares and a second watch
cta_templates: Did the last line change everything for you? 👇
Send this to someone who needs to hear that twist
Watch it again knowing the ending 😮
ab_variants: twist at the end vs twist at the midpoint

\"Teach Me, Babe\".description: 3–5 genuinely useful micro-steps (beauty, mindset, school, finance) structured for saves and continued watching
cta_templates: Save this – try step 3 first 🔖
Which step are you starting with today?
Drop a ✅ when you've tried all 5

The Morning Train Confession in Halifax.description: Halifax commute confession story – city-grounded vulnerability drives empathy comments and shares among early-morning audiences
cta_templates: Has something like this ever happened to you on the way to school?
Drop your city – does this feel real to you? 👇

The Girl Who Noticed Something Off in To.description: Subtle wrongness during a Toronto morning commute – mystery hook drives rewatch and 'me too' comments
cta_templates: Would you have noticed? 👀
Tell me what YOU think was off 👇

The Text I Received Before School in New.description: A pre-school text sets up an emotional or mysterious narrative anchored in New York – drives shares and speculation comments
cta_templates: What do you think the text said? 👇
Have you ever gotten a text that changed your whole day?

The Silent Walk Through Boston That Chan.description: A wordless Boston morning walk unfolds as a turning-point narrative – atmosphere and emotional shift drive saves and rewatches
cta_templates: Save this if a walk has ever changed how you felt 🔖

cta_templates: Have you ever opened a message too late? 😔
Drop what you would have done 👇

Coffee shop energy is different – drop your city ☕

The Routine Morning That Felt Different.description: A familiar Toronto morning routine subtly shifts – small wrongness drives rewatch for clues
cta_templates: Watch it twice – did you catch when it shifted? 👀
Tell me the moment it felt off to you 👇

Innocent Beginning → Creepy Realization.description: Seemingly innocent New York opening slowly becomes something unsettling – tonal shift drives rewatch from the beginning to catch early signs
